item.title: TheAthleticFC: The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 10min It comes out of nowhere. Like being shot by a sniper. Some people even re
item.description:
The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 10min It comes out of nowhere. Like being shot by a sniper. Some people even recall hearing a loud pop, like a gunshot. Others simply feel it; a sudden, intense pain in the back of their lower leg as their Achilles snaps in two.
For Liverpool striker Hugo Ekitike it came in the most Mostrar más 9 2 31 4 mil
